fa-file-circle-minus.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and a small circle containing a horizontal minus bar overlaid at the lower right; folded-corner rectangle combined with a circular minus badge
fa-file-circle-minus.functionalityId: removes or detaches a file from a collection or list; deletes a document entry from the current set
fa-file-circle-minus.intentId: remove a file from a group or document list; reduce the number of files in a managed collection

fa-file-circle-plus.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and a small circle containing a plus sign overlaid at the lower right; folded-corner rectangle combined with a circular add badge
fa-file-circle-plus.functionalityId: adds a new file or attaches a document to a collection; creates a new file entry within a set or folder
fa-file-circle-plus.intentId: add a new document to a group or file list; attach a file to an existing collection or record

fa-file-circle-question.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and a small circle containing a question mark overlaid at the lower right; folded-corner rectangle combined with a circular question badge
fa-file-circle-question.functionalityId: opens help documentation or indicates an unknown or unrecognized file; flags a document whose type or status is unclear
fa-file-circle-question.intentId: get help or more information about an unrecognized file; identify a document whose format or status is uncertain

fa-file-circle-xmark.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and a small circle containing an X mark overlaid at the lower right; folded-corner rectangle combined with a circular close or error badge
fa-file-circle-xmark.functionalityId: deletes or rejects a file with an error or dismissal action; marks a document as invalid or permanently removed
fa-file-circle-xmark.intentId: permanently delete or reject a file; dismiss or cancel a document that is no longer needed

fa-file-code.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and angled bracket symbols on its face resembling code syntax; folded-corner rectangle displaying less-than and greater-than angle bracket marks
fa-file-code.functionalityId: opens a source code or programming script file; navigates to a code editor or development file viewer
fa-file-code.intentId: view or edit a source code or script file; access a programming document in a code editor

fa-file-contract.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and several horizontal lines of text with a signature line or pen stroke near the bottom; folded-corner rectangle displaying stacked text lines and a handwritten signature mark
fa-file-contract.functionalityId: opens or presents a contract or legal agreement document for review; navigates to a document requiring signature or formal acceptance
fa-file-contract.intentId: review or sign a legal contract or formal agreement; manage a binding document that requires authorization

fa-file-csv.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and the text label CSV printed on its face; folded-corner rectangle bearing a CSV format abbreviation
fa-file-csv.functionalityId: opens or exports data as a CSV spreadsheet file; downloads or imports a comma-separated values document
fa-file-csv.intentId: work with tabular data in a comma-separated file format; export or import structured data as a CSV file

fa-file-doc.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and the text label DOC printed on its face; folded-corner rectangle bearing a DOC word processing format abbreviation
fa-file-doc.functionalityId: opens or downloads a DOC word processing file; navigates to a document in Microsoft Word or compatible format
fa-file-doc.intentId: view or edit a word processing document in DOC format; access a text document saved in the classic Word file format

fa-file-download.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and a downward-pointing arrow overlaid on its face; folded-corner rectangle with a vertical arrow pointing toward the bottom edge
fa-file-download.functionalityId: downloads a file to the local device or storage; saves a document from the server or cloud to the user's machine
fa-file-download.intentId: save a file locally by downloading it; retrieve a document from a remote source to the device

fa-file-eps.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and the text label EPS printed on its face; folded-corner rectangle bearing an EPS vector format abbreviation
fa-file-eps.functionalityId: opens or exports a file in EPS vector graphics format; processes an Encapsulated PostScript document
fa-file-eps.intentId: work with a vector graphic or illustration saved in EPS format; export or share artwork as an Encapsulated PostScript file

fa-file-excel.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and an X-shaped or stylized letter X logo mark on its face resembling the Excel branding; folded-corner rectangle with a bold X emblem representing a spreadsheet application
fa-file-excel.functionalityId: opens or exports data as a Microsoft Excel spreadsheet file; navigates to a workbook in XLSX or XLS format
fa-file-excel.intentId: view or edit a spreadsheet in Microsoft Excel format; access a workbook document for data analysis or calculation

fa-file-exclamation.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and an exclamation mark symbol centered on its face; folded-corner rectangle displaying a vertical bar and dot alert punctuation
fa-file-exclamation.functionalityId: flags a document with a warning or error requiring attention; marks a file as having a critical issue or important notice
fa-file-exclamation.intentId: draw attention to a file that has a problem or requires review; alert the user that a document contains a warning or issue

fa-file-export.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and a rightward-pointing arrow departing from the page toward the right side; folded-corner rectangle with an outbound horizontal arrow exiting the document
fa-file-export.functionalityId: exports a file or document to an external format or destination; sends a document out of the current application to another system
fa-file-export.intentId: export a document to another format or external location; share or transfer a file out of the current application

fa-file-fragment.appearanceId: a document page shape that appears partially cut, broken, or segmented with a ragged or incomplete lower edge; folded-corner rectangle with a torn or fragmented bottom portion suggesting an incomplete file
fa-file-fragment.functionalityId: indicates a partial, fragmented, or incomplete file in a transfer or storage context; represents a document chunk or segment within a multi-part file
fa-file-fragment.intentId: manage or identify a file fragment or incomplete document; work with a partial file segment as part of a larger set

fa-file-gif.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and the text label GIF printed on its face; folded-corner rectangle bearing a GIF animated image format abbreviation
fa-file-gif.functionalityId: opens or previews a GIF animation or image file; processes a document saved in Graphics Interchange Format
fa-file-gif.intentId: view or share an animated GIF image file; work with a document stored in GIF format

fa-file-half-dashed.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner where the lower half of the page border is rendered as a dashed or dotted line; folded-corner rectangle with a solid upper border transitioning to a dashed lower outline
fa-file-half-dashed.functionalityId: represents a partially complete, draft, or pending file state; indicates a document that is not yet fully finalized or committed
fa-file-half-dashed.intentId: track or identify a file that is in a draft or incomplete state; manage a document that has not yet been fully processed or saved

fa-file-heart.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and a heart shape overlaid or centered on its face; folded-corner rectangle displaying a filled heart symbol
fa-file-heart.functionalityId: marks a file as a favorite or loved document; saves a document to a favorites or liked items collection
fa-file-heart.intentId: favorite or love a specific file or document; save a document to a personal favorites list

fa-file-image.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and a small mountain peak or landscape thumbnail with a circle representing a sun or image placeholder on its face; folded-corner rectangle displaying a photo thumbnail with a horizon line and circular shape
fa-file-image.functionalityId: opens or previews an image file such as a photo or graphic; navigates to a picture document in a supported image format
fa-file-image.intentId: view or manage an image or photo file; access a picture document for display or editing

fa-file-import.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and a leftward-pointing arrow entering the page from the right side; folded-corner rectangle with an inbound horizontal arrow pointing into the document
fa-file-import.functionalityId: imports a file or data from an external source into the current application; brings a document into the system from outside
fa-file-import.intentId: import a file or dataset into the current application; bring an external document into the working environment

fa-file-invoice.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and several horizontal lines of text plus a set of short parallel stubs suggesting line items; folded-corner rectangle with stacked text lines and itemized row marks resembling a billing document
fa-file-invoice.functionalityId: opens or generates an invoice or billing document; navigates to an itemized bill or payment record
fa-file-invoice.intentId: view or manage an invoice or billing statement; access financial charges listed in a formal document

fa-file-invoice-dollar.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner, horizontal text lines, and a dollar sign symbol visible on its face; folded-corner rectangle displaying stacked lines and a currency symbol suggesting a financial invoice
fa-file-invoice-dollar.functionalityId: opens or generates a dollar-denominated invoice or payment bill; navigates to a financial document showing charges in USD
fa-file-invoice-dollar.intentId: view or process a financial invoice showing dollar amounts; manage a billing document with monetary line items

fa-file-jpg.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and the text label JPG printed on its face; folded-corner rectangle bearing a JPG raster image format abbreviation
fa-file-jpg.functionalityId: opens or saves a file in JPEG or JPG image format; processes a raster photo document
fa-file-jpg.intentId: view or export a photo or image saved in JPG format; work with a compressed raster image file

fa-file-lock.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and a padlock shape overlaid on its face; folded-corner rectangle displaying a closed padlock symbol
fa-file-lock.functionalityId: locks a file to prevent editing or unauthorized access; marks a document as protected or read-only
fa-file-lock.intentId: protect a file from being edited or accessed without permission; secure a document with a lock to restrict modifications

fa-file-medical.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and a medical cross or plus symbol centered on its face; folded-corner rectangle displaying a bold cross or health symbol
fa-file-medical.functionalityId: opens or manages a medical record, health report, or patient document; navigates to a clinical file or healthcare form
fa-file-medical.intentId: access or manage a patient medical record or health document; view clinical data stored in a medical file

fa-file-minus.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and a horizontal minus line centered on its face; folded-corner rectangle displaying a single horizontal dash or minus bar
fa-file-minus.functionalityId: removes a file from a list or decrements a document count; deletes or subtracts a file entry from the current view
fa-file-minus.intentId: remove or reduce the number of files in a set; delete a document from a list or collection

fa-file-mov.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and the text label MOV printed on its face; folded-corner rectangle bearing a MOV video format abbreviation
fa-file-mov.functionalityId: opens or plays a MOV QuickTime video file; processes a document saved in Apple QuickTime movie format
fa-file-mov.intentId: view or play a video file saved in MOV format; work with a QuickTime movie document

fa-file-mp3.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and the text label MP3 printed on its face; folded-corner rectangle bearing an MP3 audio format abbreviation
fa-file-mp3.functionalityId: opens or plays an MP3 audio file; processes a document saved in MPEG Layer 3 audio format
fa-file-mp3.intentId: listen to or manage an audio file saved in MP3 format; work with a compressed audio document

fa-file-mp4.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and the text label MP4 printed on its face; folded-corner rectangle bearing an MP4 video format abbreviation
fa-file-mp4.functionalityId: opens or plays an MP4 video file; processes a document saved in MPEG-4 video format
fa-file-mp4.intentId: view or play a video file saved in MP4 format; work with a compressed video document

fa-file-music.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and a musical note symbol overlaid on its face; folded-corner rectangle displaying an eighth note or quarter note music symbol
fa-file-music.functionalityId: opens or plays a music or audio file; navigates to a document containing sound or musical content
fa-file-music.intentId: access or play a music file or audio document; manage a sound recording stored as a file

fa-file-pdf.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and the text label PDF printed on its face; folded-corner rectangle bearing a PDF portable document format abbreviation
fa-file-pdf.functionalityId: opens or downloads a PDF document; views or exports a file in Portable Document Format
fa-file-pdf.intentId: view or share a document saved in PDF format; access a portable file for reading or printing

fa-file-pen.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and a pen nib or pencil tip overlaid at the lower right corner; folded-corner rectangle combined with an angled pen or pencil writing instrument
fa-file-pen.functionalityId: opens a file for editing or annotation; enables text editing or writing on an existing document
fa-file-pen.intentId: edit or annotate a document by writing into it; open a file in edit or authoring mode

fa-file-plus.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and a plus sign centered on its face; folded-corner rectangle displaying a cross-shaped plus symbol
fa-file-plus.functionalityId: creates a new file or adds a document to the current workspace; opens a blank document creation dialog
fa-file-plus.intentId: create a new file or document; add a blank document to the current project or workspace

fa-file-plus-minus.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and both a plus sign and a minus sign displayed on its face; folded-corner rectangle displaying a combined plus and minus symbol indicating dual actions
fa-file-plus-minus.functionalityId: toggles between adding and removing a file or adjusts a document count up or down; manages file quantity with increment and decrement controls
fa-file-plus-minus.intentId: manage file quantities by adding or removing documents; control the count of files with combined add and remove actions

fa-file-png.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and the text label PNG printed on its face; folded-corner rectangle bearing a PNG image format abbreviation
fa-file-png.functionalityId: opens or saves a file in PNG image format; processes a document saved in Portable Network Graphics format
fa-file-png.intentId: view or export an image saved in PNG format; work with a lossless raster image file

fa-file-powerpoint.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and a stylized P logo mark on its face resembling the PowerPoint branding; folded-corner rectangle with a bold letter P emblem representing a presentation application
fa-file-powerpoint.functionalityId: opens or exports a Microsoft PowerPoint presentation file; navigates to a slide deck in PPTX or PPT format
fa-file-powerpoint.intentId: view or edit a presentation in Microsoft PowerPoint format; access a slide deck document for presenting or editing

fa-file-ppt.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and the text label PPT printed on its face; folded-corner rectangle bearing a PPT presentation format abbreviation
fa-file-ppt.functionalityId: opens or downloads a PPT presentation file; navigates to a slide deck saved in legacy PowerPoint format
fa-file-ppt.intentId: view or edit a presentation document saved in PPT format; access a slide deck in the legacy PowerPoint file format

fa-file-prescription.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and an Rx or prescription symbol centered on its face; folded-corner rectangle displaying the medical Rx abbreviation mark
fa-file-prescription.functionalityId: opens or manages a medical prescription document; navigates to a patient prescription record or pharmacy order form
fa-file-prescription.intentId: view or manage a medical prescription or pharmacy order; access a clinical prescription document for a patient

fa-file-search.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and a magnifying glass shape overlaid on its face; folded-corner rectangle combined with a circular lens and handle search symbol
fa-file-search.functionalityId: searches within a file or opens a document search interface; finds content inside a specific document or file repository
fa-file-search.intentId: search for content within a file or document collection; locate specific text or data inside a document

fa-file-shield.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and a shield shape overlaid on its face; folded-corner rectangle displaying a protective shield emblem
fa-file-shield.functionalityId: marks a file as protected or securely governed; applies security or compliance protection to a document
fa-file-shield.intentId: protect a document with security or compliance controls; mark a file as governed or shielded from unauthorized access

fa-file-signature.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and a flowing cursive signature line near the bottom of the page; folded-corner rectangle displaying a handwritten cursive stroke along a horizontal signature line
fa-file-signature.functionalityId: requests or applies a digital or handwritten signature to a document; opens a document requiring formal sign-off
fa-file-signature.intentId: sign a document digitally or formally; authorize a file with a signature for legal or approval purposes

fa-file-slash.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner overlaid with a diagonal slash line crossing through the entire document shape; folded-corner rectangle bisected by a forward or backward diagonal strike-through
fa-file-slash.functionalityId: indicates a file that is blocked, disabled, or unavailable; marks a document as inaccessible or not permitted
fa-file-slash.intentId: communicate that a file is blocked, restricted, or unavailable; indicate that a document cannot be accessed or used

fa-file-spreadsheet.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and a grid of horizontal and vertical lines forming table cells on its face; folded-corner rectangle displaying a tabular grid or cell structure
fa-file-spreadsheet.functionalityId: opens or creates a spreadsheet document with rows and columns; navigates to a tabular data file for editing or analysis
fa-file-spreadsheet.intentId: work with a spreadsheet or tabular data document; access a grid-based file for organizing or calculating data

fa-file-svg.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and the text label SVG printed on its face; folded-corner rectangle bearing an SVG scalable vector format abbreviation
fa-file-svg.functionalityId: opens or exports a file in SVG scalable vector graphics format; processes a document saved as Scalable Vector Graphics
fa-file-svg.intentId: view or edit a vector graphic saved in SVG format; work with a scalable web-ready vector image file

fa-file-times.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and an X or times mark centered on its face; folded-corner rectangle displaying a bold X or multiplication sign
fa-file-times.functionalityId: closes or deletes a file with an X action; removes or dismisses a document from the current view
fa-file-times.intentId: close or delete a document using an X action; remove a file from a list or workspace

fa-file-upload.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and an upward-pointing arrow overlaid on its face; folded-corner rectangle with a vertical arrow pointing toward the top edge
fa-file-upload.functionalityId: uploads a file to a server, cloud storage, or remote destination; sends a document from the local device to an online location
fa-file-upload.intentId: upload a document to a server or cloud storage; transfer a local file to a remote location

fa-file-user.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and a person silhouette or user profile shape overlaid on its face; folded-corner rectangle displaying a rounded head and shoulders user figure
fa-file-user.functionalityId: opens a user profile document or personal record file; navigates to a file associated with a specific user or person
fa-file-user.intentId: access a personal profile or user-specific document; view or manage a file linked to an individual user

fa-file-vector.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and a vector path or bezier curve shape drawn on its face; folded-corner rectangle displaying anchor points and a curved or angular path line
fa-file-vector.functionalityId: opens or exports a vector graphics or illustration file; navigates to a document containing scalable vector paths or artwork
fa-file-vector.intentId: view or edit a vector illustration or graphic file; work with a document containing scalable path-based artwork

fa-file-video.appearanceId: a document page with a folded upper-right corner and a video play triangle or film frame shape overlaid on its face; folded-corner rectangle displaying a rightward-pointing play button or filmstrip mark
fa-file-video.functionalityId: opens or plays a video file stored as a document; navigates to a video media file for playback
fa-file-video.intentId: view or play a video document file; access a stored video recording for playback or editing
